mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user ( user_uuid, username, password, nickname, avatar_url, email, is_delete, status, update_time, update_user, create_time, create_user ) VALUES (#{user_uuid}, #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar_url}, #{email}, #{is_delete}, #{status}, #{update_time}, #{update_user}, #{create_time}, #{create_user})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_uuid, username, password, nickname, user_role, avatar_url, email, status FROM tb_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT user_id, user_uuid, username, password, nickname, user_role, avatar_url, email, status FROM tb_user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT user_id, user_uuid, username, password, nickname, user_role, avatar_url, email, status FROM tb_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete = 0

SELECT nickname, user_id, avatar_url, username, user_role, user_uuid, status, create_time FROM tb_user WHERE is_delete = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{user.username}, '%')
AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{user.email}, '%')
AND user_uuid = #{user.user_uuid}
